name: Woden GP
short_description: Car racing in isometric perspective has travelled through time to the present, in a faithful recreation of 90s arcade machine style!
detailed_description:
The thrill of isometric racing has traveled through time to this day! Become the best driver of all time, participating in championships and unique events, whether on asphalt, dirt or snow!
More than 15 cars, more than 20 circuits in different categories, both closed and checkpoint stages against the clock.



Start your racing career to become the king of the Woden GP championships! You will start by participating in simple and compact cars while you progress to the Gold Class, where you can drive prototypes and the fastest cars!

Pay attention to the advice of your team leader, Pau Calleja! He will always be there to help you and encourage you.



Try to reach the finish line before time runs out! Exactly like the arcades experiences from yesterday! Can you reach all the checkpoints with a single coin?



Choose any track, with any car and race how you want! Of course, you will have to unlock them all with your progress.



■ Vibrant graphics that stand out thanks to the artistic style that emulates pencil drawing.
■ Wide variety of tracks and scenarios; deserts, snowy landscapes, cities, forests and more.
■ A fun selection of cars in different classes, from compact to prototypes.
■ Powerful soundtrack, creating a fantastic and nostalgic atmosphere.
■ Split-screen mode for two players.
■ 4 levels of difficulty, for newcomers of the genre and even to the most experienced drivers!
■ Story mode, with tips from the team leader and a multitude of challenges!
■ Unlockable graphic filters.
■ 12 Unlockable Achievements!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, German, Spanish - Latin America, Greek, Japanese, Russian, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal
